mnemonics.title: Master Theorem Cases
mnemonics.content: Fight Club Rules: 1. f(n) is smaller (ε exists), 2. Equal fighters (tight bound), 3. f(n) dominates (with regularity check)

acronyms.usage: Reference textbook where Master Theorem is formally presented

visualTips.visualization: Imagine a tree where each node has 'a' children of size n/b, with f(n) work at each level

analogies.analogy: Like comparing workers: 1. Manager does less work, 2. Equal contribution, 3. Manager does most work (with verification)
